metadata.reference: A. Sytchkova, A. Belosludtsev, L. Volosevičienė, R. Juškėnas, R. Simniškis. Optical, structural and electrical properties of sputtered ultrathin chromium films. Opt. Mater. 121, 111530 (2021) (Numerical data kindly provided by Alexandr Belosludtsev)
metadata.comments: 12 nm film deposited on fused silica by magnetron sputtering.
